svg.aria-label: Compaction in three tiers, hot, warm, and cold, keeping the live window bounded as a run grows. The hot tier holds the last two turns verbatim, an indigo card showing the user question about the earbuds warranty and the tool result that Globex earbuds carry a 2-year limited warranty. The warm tier is an amber rolling summary of decisions and tool outputs, showing the calculator result of 180 dollars, 200 times 0.9 after the fee. The cold tier is a single grey lossy line reading 2 earlier turns summarized. A token budget bar at the bottom shows the window staying at or under the budget of 40 tokens as the run grows from turn 1 to turn 10. A side panel contrasts compaction with RAG Part 20 condensation, which rewrites the user question into a standalone one, for example what about its battery becomes what is the battery life of the earbuds, marking the two as different operations.
svg.title: Compaction in hot, warm, and cold tiers, contrasted with RAG Part 20 condensation

svg.text: Re-sending the whole transcript each step overflows the window. Three tiers compress the history so the live window stays bounded as the run grows.
